subcodes.first_line: In all conditions, this Wronged One hath beseeched from the All-Glorious, the Most High, the protection of the branches and leaves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم در جمیع احوال از غنی متعال حفظ افنان و اوراق را طلب نموده مقصود از
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering and imprisonment
